networks.name: Yazing
networks.notes: Secondary discovery platform. 100% commission pass-through model; commission funded by Priority's program budget.

commission.notes: 5% on all sales. No tiered, bonus, or seasonal rate structure detected. Unchanged across all 2026 audit cycles (9th consecutive).

affiliate_program.shipping: Same business day on orders before 12:00 noon ET

creative_assets.notes: No self-serve public creative library. Priority team available to assist with marketing content needs. AvantLink dashboard provides banners, product feeds, and deep links to approved affiliates.

affiliate_program.approval_requirements: Active website or social channel with original outdoor/recreation content; coupon/rebate/deal-aggregator sites not accepted; manual review via AvantLink

product_catalog.key_differentiator: Low-maintenance Gates Carbon belt drive (rust-free, grease-free) across all models
product_catalog.flagship_ebike: Priority Current Plus E-Bike (750W mid-drive motor, electronic shifting, ~$3,299)

vs_benchmark.commission: at_median — 5% matches category median. Velowave (7-10%) and Velotric (7%) remain structurally above for e-bike content creators.
vs_benchmark.cookie: below_median — 21 days vs. 30-day category standard. 9th consecutive audit cycle with zero movement.
vs_benchmark.aov: below_median on standard line (~$550 avg); well above_median on e-bike line (~$3,299 Current Plus = ~$165 EPC)

afare_signals.commission_note: At category median (5%). No improvement trend across 9 consecutive audit cycles. Competing e-bike programs (Velowave 7-10%, Velotric 7%) are materially more lucrative for e-bike-focused creators.
afare_signals.cookie_note: 21-day cookie — 9 consecutive audit cycles below the 30-day category standard. High-consideration bicycle purchases routinely span multiple research sessions; the attribution gap is a compounding deterrent for sophisticated affiliates.
afare_signals.aov_note: Standard bike AOV ~$550 → ~$27.50 EPC at 5%. E-bike Current Plus ~$3,299 → ~$165 EPC. E-bike content remains ~6× more valuable per conversion for affiliate creators.
strengths: Unique belt-drive low-maintenance positioning — strong repeatable content hook for lifestyle, commuter, and parent creators
Same-day shipping + 7-day customer support = conversion-positive proof points for affiliate content
Affirm financing expands addressable buyer pool on higher-ticket e-bikes
AvantLink is a trusted, fraud-resistant network with deep-link and product-feed tooling
Costco Next listing signals mainstream brand credibility
Yazing secondary platform adds affiliate discovery surface
weaknesses: 21-day cookie stagnant across 9 consecutive audit cycles — zero improvement signal since at least mid-2024
5% flat commission — no tiered, performance-bonus, or seasonal rate structure ever detected in 9 audit cycles
No self-serve creative library; custom asset requests require direct Priority team contact
Single primary network (AvantLink) limits organic affiliate discovery
Spring 2026 buying peak now past prime — no seasonal promotional rate or bonus campaign detected across any 2026 audit cycle
opportunities: MEMORIAL DAY (May 26) — 28 days out; next major commerce window. Priority has launched zero promotional campaigns in nine tracked 2026 audit cycles. Proactive affiliate team outreach NOW is critical to request a Memorial Day rate uplift or bonus window.
E-bike EPC: Current Plus at $3,299 × 5% = ~$165 EPC — among highest in DTC bike affiliate space; primary content angle for creators
Urban car-free lifestyle and commuter content — belt-drive narrative resonates with sustainability and car-free audiences
Kids bike segment — rust/grease-free belt drive is a unique safety/zero-maintenance pitch for parent channels
Comparison content (Priority vs. Rad Power, Aventon, Velowave) drives high-intent organic traffic; Priority's simplicity narrative differentiates well in comparisons
Cookie extension request: 9 consecutive cycles of stagnation makes a formal creator partnership pitch (cookie extension + creative assets) overdue and justified by data
threats: Velowave (7-10% / 60-day cookie) and Velotric (7% / 30-day) offer materially better affiliate economics in e-bike segment
Aventon (4% / 30-day) and Rad Power Bikes (5% / 30-day) match commission but beat Priority on cookie duration
Spring 2026 peak buying window has passed its prime (late April) without any detected promotional uplift — nine consecutive audit cycles with no seasonal action
Costco Next listing creates price-comparison bypass risk for affiliate link attribution
Nine consecutive cycles of complete program stagnation signals persistently low affiliate channel investment — creator attention flight risk toward higher-paying programs is at critical alert

changes_since_last_audit.change_summary: No changes detected. Commission (5%), cookie (21 days), networks (AvantLink / Yazing), AOV ($550+), payment terms, and all program structure are fully unchanged from the 2026-04-27 audit. Program has been static with no modifications since at least mid-2024.
changes_since_last_audit.program_stability: high — zero rate changes, network additions, creative library launches, seasonal promotions, or structural modifications across all tracked 2026 audit cycles (9 consecutive)

benchmark_update.notes: bicycles_dtc benchmarks remain accurate. All current sources confirm 5% commission / 21-day cookie consistent with existing benchmark values. No update to category-benchmarks.json required this cycle.

recommended_actions: MEMORIAL DAY OUTREACH (CRITICAL — 28 DAYS): May 26 is 28 days out — contact Priority affiliate team now (info@prioritybicycles.com) to request a Memorial Day rate uplift, bonus window, or creator co-marketing opportunity. Nine audit cycles with zero seasonal activation; this is the last realistic window to act before the peak.

COOKIE ESCALATION (9th CYCLE — CRITICAL THRESHOLD): Nine consecutive audits at 21 days vs. 30-day category standard with zero movement. Formal, data-backed outreach to Priority requesting a cookie extension tied to a creator partnership proposal is now overdue.
E-BIKE CONTENT PRIORITY: Current Plus ~$3,299 at 5% = ~$165 EPC — coach affiliated creators to lead with e-bike content; standard line EPC (~$27.50) is thin for the production effort involved.

COMPETITIVE REBALANCE REVIEW: Velowave (7-10%/60-day) and Velotric (7%/30-day) offer structurally superior affiliate economics for e-bike-focused creators — if Priority cookie and commission stagnation continues through the Memorial Day cycle, recommend formally rebalancing top creator partner recommendations toward higher-paying programs.

CREATIVE ASSET REQUEST: In the same Memorial Day / cookie outreach above, request access to a dedicated creative asset set (banner templates, lifestyle imagery, product comparison sheets) to reduce affiliate onboarding friction.
